description_long: This bungalow features a modern, boxy design with a flat, geometric-patterned roof and a clean, minimalist facade. The front is dominated by large, floor-to-ceiling glass panels and a central glass door, flanked by narrow vertical windows. The exterior is clad in horizontal white siding, with dark trim accentuating the window and door frames. A wide, paved entry platform with two rectangular planter beds leads up to the main entrance via a short set of steps. The side elevations reveal additional large windows, including a sliding glass door and a smaller window cluster, providing ample natural light. The overall structure is compact and single-storied, with a focus on simplicity and contemporary aesthetics.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat geometric roof, large glass panels, and a minimalist white facade accented by dark trim and a paved entry platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main glass entrance, large windows, and a wide paved entry with planter beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof's geometric pattern and the horizontal white siding, with the entry platform extending outward.
description_view_2: Rear/side view displaying a large sliding glass door, a cluster of smaller windows, and the continuation of the minimalist siding.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a single tall window and a clear view of the entry platform's extension.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front and side windows
